Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Benson]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Benson's body is made of or covered in metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Benson has one eye that blazes blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Simon marches back down to Benson.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — Benson is a skeleton who lounges on a dark throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — Benson's eyes glow with sapphire flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — Benson wields a huge double-bladed axe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Benson is someone whose steel Kai has earned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Simon can call out to Benson for steel.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Benson once gave Kai a quicksilver vial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Benson sits on a throne in Valinhall's blue-lit basement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Benson is a steel skeleton.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Benson has steel that Denner tried to obtain.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Benson is mentioned as a potential example of a guardian turning into an artificial construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Benson is a skeleton fighting Erastes in the basement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Benson is a steel skeleton who wields an axe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Benson is a skeleton made of shining silvery metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Kai had taken power from Benson.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
